name: 2BDamned ~|Madness Combat|~
description:
2BDamned from Madness Combat

The plot is free, you can do whatever you want with him, there is no initial message.

I also added other members of Status Quo as secondary characters. The bot is not very willing to add secondary characters to the story, and if it does, it doesn't always add the ones you want, so I suggest putting “play the role of 2BDamned and ...” at the end of your message if you want Hank/Sanford/Deimos. Also the bot can sometimes write for you if there are a lot of characters, there's nothing I can do about that. If you notice any error, let me know, I'll try to fix it.

The author of the artwork is unknown to me, so if you know anything, please let me know.
creator: Big_Zelibobka
